items.title: Not even a quick end to Iran war can save AI stock bubble now
items.summary: The Iran war has baked in stagflation and starvation through big reductions in the supply of oil and fertilisers. This inflationary pressure will only increase. As inflation sucks liquidity out of financial markets and into the real economy, bond yields are being pushed up across the world. If bond yields rise by more than a percentage point, a likely scenario before the year’s end, the liquidity

RT by @mfa_russia: Excerpts from the Statement by Deputy Permanent Representative of the Russian Federation Aleksandr Volgarev at the OSCE Permanent Council meeting on May 21, 2026, on the topic “On the Visit of the CSTO Delegation to the OSCE”

• Within the framework of Russia’s chairmanship in the Collective Security Treaty Organization the CSTO delegation held a series of events at the OSCE.

• During meetings between the Secretaries General of the CSTO and the OSCE, as well as with the Swiss OSCE Chairmanship, the parties discussed the need to restore expert dialogue between the secretariats of the two organizations.

• On May 19, a roundtable discussion on CSTO activities was held at the OSCE headquarters with the participation of representatives from CSTO member states, experts from the CIS and SCO, as well as members of academic and public circles from Austria and Switzerland.

• The CSTO fully shares the OSCE’s fundamental principle that no state or group of states should strengthen its security at the expense of the security of others. The principle of equal and indivisible security should serve as the foundation of a polycentric world order.
